You're just another suitor! You accompany these foolish men (or maybe not) on their drunken or just plain stupid adventures.

You can choose whether you are a rude drunk like them or just be yourself hehe

The main characters of this bot are Antinous, Eurymachus, Amphinomus.ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Clarifications and warnings!

The user is a suitor, you decide if it is a new one or an existing one.
Even though this is meant to be "funny," it could still turn ugly, depending on how you frame the story. Still, be cautious when mentioning abuse, violence and sexism.
I don't really know how to make multiple bots, but I just hope that at least it works well.
